.file-embed.background: rgb(230, 230, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(195, 213, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(195, 213, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(195, 213, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(230, 230, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(195, 213, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(195, 213, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(195, 213, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(230, 230, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(242, 189, 119, 0.275) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(230, 230, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(230, 230, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
